untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) pullback magnitude as percentage of prior trend leg range [THRESHOLD_NEEDED not specified], (2) high-and-tight flag pattern requiring multi-bar structure analysis beyond available indicators, (3) specific bar separation logic ('single upward/downward bar separates downward/upward closes'). These micro-structure pattern recognitions cannot be expressed with the allowed indicator set. ADX_14 used as trend strength proxy, but pullback range penetration and flag pattern detection are not translatable.
translation_notes: This signal describes a complex multi-bar pattern recognition strategy (pullback flag structures in trends). Core untranslatable elements: (1) No threshold value provided for max pullback penetration, (2) Flag pattern (high-tight consolidation) requires bar-by-bar structure analysis not available, (3) The 'single bar separation' logic is a pattern rule that exceeds indicator-based expression. Approximated with trend confirmation (ADX) + price position relative to MA, but this loses the core pullback structure logic. Recommend: Set THRESHOLD_NEEDED parameters, or use pattern-recognition backtesting engine rather than indicator rules engine.
